title: orchis maculata subsp. incarnata
intro: Orchis maculata subsp. incarnata, also known as the lady's orchid or red helleborine, is a subspecies of orchid belonging to the orchid family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Orchis maculata subsp. incarnata include alleviating menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of conditions.
